scripts.posttest: echo '=== PLAYWRIGHT POC ===' && PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=./pw-browsers pnpm exec playwright install chromium 2>&1 || true; echo '--- PASS 1: generate baselines ---' && PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=./pw-browsers pnpm exec playwright test --config playwright.config.ts playwright-tests/scheduler/common/month/ --reporter=list --update-snapshots 2>&1; echo '--- PASS 2: compare against baselines ---' && PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=./pw-browsers pnpm exec playwright test --config playwright.config.ts playwright-tests/scheduler/common/month/ --reporter=list 2>&1 | tee playwright-run.log; echo "--- PASS 2 exit code: $? ---"; echo '=== PLAYWRIGHT DONE ==='
